articles.title: The Salutation of the Dawn
articles.complete_text:
THE SALUTATION OF THE DAWN

Listen to the exhortation of the Dawn!
Look to this day!
For it is Life, the very Life of Life.
In its brief course lie all the Verities and Realities of our Existence;
The Bliss of Growth,
The Glory of Action,
The Splendor of Beauty;
For Yesterday is but a Dream,
And Tomorrow is only a Vision;
But Today well lived makes
Every Yesterday a Dream of Happiness,
And every Tomorrow a Vision of Hope.
Look well therefore to this Day!
Such is the Salutation of the Dawn.
—Selected.
articles.notes: This is a complete inspirational piece/poem that was commonly published in magazines of this era. It's formatted as a standalone article with clear title and attribution, not part of advertisements or table of contents.

misc_summary: The remaining content consists of legitimate miscellaneous material: table of contents, publication information, advertisements for various businesses (undertakers, banks, jewelers, utilities, food products), subscription information, and a small text fragment that appears to be from an incomplete article about a conference discussion.
